params.prompt: Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Dark luxury tech course poster. Title HERMES AGENT, subtitle Multi-Agent AI Masterclass. Style: black graphite background, champagne gold hairline accents mixed with electric royal blue glow, editorial serif headline, luxury founder-media feel. Layout: LIMITLESS CLUB top; HERMES AGENT huge; quote card: Build the team that never sleeps.; Thai line: คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; 3 premium benefit cards: Chief of Staff Agent, Content Agent, Vibe Coding Agent; bottom CTA: สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; footer: By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Visual: premium AI operating system interface, subtle chrome frame, faint agent nodes. Keep text large and accurate, 4:5, safe margins, no clutter, no extra logos, no duplicate text.
